DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $301.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
